products.name: Kenya Developer Starter Pack
products.description: Curated set of cheatsheets, templates and scripts for full-stack developers. Includes Linux, Docker, FastAPI, React and Git workflows.

products.name: University Exam Study Pack — CS
products.description: Comprehensive notes and past papers for computer science units. Covers Data Structures, Algorithms, OS, Networks, and Databases.

products.name: CTF Quickstart Bundle
products.description: Cheatsheets and tool guides for web, pwn, forensics and crypto CTF categories. OWASP Top 10 mapped, with Kali Linux tooling reference.

products.name: Self-Hosted Infrastructure Playbook
products.description: Step-by-step playbooks for Headscale/Tailscale VPN, Caddy reverse proxy, Docker Compose stacks, and DuckDNS TLS. Battle-tested on Ubuntu 24.04.

products.name: UI Design Starter Kit — Figma & SVG
products.description: 50 ready-to-use SVG components and a Figma community file for dashboards, landing pages and mobile apps. Includes dark mode variants.

products.name: MCP Server Development Guide
products.description: Practical guide to building Model Context Protocol servers in Python (FastMCP) and TypeScript. Covers tools, resources, OAuth, and deployment on Docker.
